patterns_discovered.description: Uses @dataclass(frozen=True) with custom __init__ and object.__setattr__ to set immutable attributes after environment loading
patterns_discovered.reasoning: Enables immutable configuration object while supporting lazy initialization from env vars

patterns_discovered.pattern: Lazy validation with explicit require_* methods
patterns_discovered.description: Keys are loaded but not validated until explicitly requested via require_gemini_key() or require_chutes_key()
patterns_discovered.reasoning: Allows optional configuration - only validate keys when they're actually needed

patterns_discovered.description: Locates .env by walking up directory tree from config.py: parent.parent.parent / '.env'
patterns_discovered.reasoning: Makes config.py location-independent and follows common project structure conventions

patterns_discovered.description: ConfigurationError includes clear instructions on how to set missing environment variables
patterns_discovered.reasoning: Improves developer experience by providing actionable next steps

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Frozen dataclass with custom __init__ is unconventional
gotchas_discovered.description: Using @dataclass(frozen=True) with a custom __init__ method requires object.__setattr() workaround, which may confuse maintainers

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Type hints declare optional keys but don't enforce optionality
gotchas_discovered.description: Fields are typed as 'str | None' but treated as required when require_* methods are called, creating implicit contract
gotchas_discovered.impact: Potential confusion about whether keys are truly optional or required

gotchas_discovered.description: Missing keys are only caught when require_* methods are explicitly called, not at Settings instantiation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Configuration errors may surface late in application startup

gotchas_discovered.description: Hard-coded path traversal (parent.parent.parent) assumes specific project structure
gotchas_discovered.impact: Brittleness if project structure changes; requires relative imports from src/musicalizer/

requirements_met: Define Settings class with GEMINI_API_KEY and CHUTES_API_KEY
Raise ConfigurationError with clear instructions when keys missing

recommendations.suggestion: Replace custom __init__ on frozen dataclass with __post_init__ or factory method
recommendations.rationale: More idiomatic Python; avoids object.__setattr__ workaround; improves code clarity
recommendations.example: Use @dataclass with __post_init__ or create a classmethod factory instead

recommendations.suggestion: Consider validating required keys at Settings instantiation if they're truly required
recommendations.rationale: Fail-fast principle; catch configuration errors earlier in application lifecycle
recommendations.alternative: Document that require_* methods must be called before using keys

recommendations.suggestion: Add defensive check for .env file existence before load_dotenv
recommendations.rationale: Prevents silent failures if .env is not found; improves debugging experience

recommendations.suggestion: Add docstrings to __init__ explaining the Path traversal logic
recommendations.rationale: Clarifies why parent.parent.parent is used and prevents future breakage
